228 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
When the cause of death is known through the rules men-
tioned above, you can find out the kind of place where death
takes place. It is indicated by the planet occupying the ascend-
ant or by the one owning the rising Navamsa. In case there is
no planet in the Lagna, it will be indicated by the ruler of the
